title.en: Deep underground in the area of Wuzhi Mountain,...

content.en:
Deep underground in the area of Wuzhi Mountain, there is life.

It is not strange that there is a life, but this life is not an ordinary life, and it has no talent, but under the investigation of the copy talent, the origin of this life cannot be hidden from Ye Tian at all.

"Innate Origin Life!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath.

Deep underground, there is an innate origin life, and there is more than one.

He sensed it carefully, there were a total of six Innate Origin Beings there!

Before, an innate origin life was born here in Wuzhi Mountain, which attracted a large number of true monarchs to fight, I don't know how many true monarchs fell, and even the true monarchs at the top of the true monarch list were seriously injured and fled.

It can be seen from this that the preciousness of the innate origin life is enough to make any true monarch crazy!

"Six Innate Origin Beings, if used reasonably, are enough to give birth to six True Ancestors! Some ordinary great forces in the chaos only have one True Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was very excited, if he got the six innate origin lifeforms, even if he didn't use it, he could give it to his relatives and cultivate them into true ancestors.

For example, his wife and sister, their comprehension is actually not high, even if she is endowed with the talent of comprehension, but the basic talent is difficult to improve, so the hope of achieving the true ancestor in the future is really infinitely close to 0!

Ye Tian has always been thinking about how to help his wife and sister break through the True Ancestor, and the innate origin life is where the hope lies.

However, Ye Tian didn't immediately arrest the six Innate Origin Beings, because he felt that there were still True Monarchs in the surrounding area, and they didn't know that there were Innate Origin Beings here, just the idea of looking for other Innate Origin Things.

"If you are arrested now, if you make a little movement, you will definitely kill a bunch of true monarchs, and even cause the true monarchs at the top of the list of true monarchs!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His current strength is too far from the True Monarch at the top of the True Monarch List, even the Origin Divine Power like the Blood River True Body can't keep him alive, and he will definitely be killed.

Therefore, Ye Tian endured and left this area and went to other places to find the innate origin thing.

Time passed slowly, and as the realm of the Boundary Source continued to be developed, the things of the Innate Origin gradually became scarce, and the top-level Innate Origin things became even rarer, and only the high-level Innate Origin things could still be found occasionally.

Under such circumstances, some of the powerful True Monarchs left, leaving only some of the weaker True Monarchs still looking for them.

As a result, some of the True Monarchs from the outside world poured in again, they were afraid of those True Monarchs and powerful top True Monarchs before, but now the Realm Source Realm is a little safer, and they naturally dare to come in.

However, there were still too many True Monarchs in the Realm of Origin that had fallen, tens of millions.

Even Ye Tian had encountered danger many times, and once he was surrounded by dozens of powerful True Monarchs, and he almost couldn't escape.

But Ye Tian's luck was still good, and in the end, he turned the danger into a disaster, and he gained a lot.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Wuzhi Mountain area again, there were no True Monarchs here, because all the innate origin things here had been collected, and other True Monarchs would naturally not come here.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe over and over again, and after confirming that there was no True Monarch nearby, he used his Hidden Earth Divine Power to go to the depths of the underground of Wuzhi Mountain.

Not long after, Ye Tian approached the Innate Origin Creatures, but found himself in an underground space.

After entering the underground space, Ye Tian found a lake, which contained an amazing innate origin power, and in the lake, there were six humanoid creatures playing like dolls.

These six humanoid creatures are none other than Innate Origin Creatures!

"This space is a world of its own, and it has an innate ability to hide, so it is no wonder that the existence of this world cannot be detected when observed from above. Obviously, this is the innate origin space given to the innate origin creatures by the realm of the realm, and the innate origin beings are hiding here, and it is difficult to be discovered. Ye Tian guessed.

If it weren't for the fact that he had the talent for replication and could detect the information of any creature, he would never have been able to discover the innate origin creature.

In addition to the six innate origin creatures, Ye Tian also found that there were a large number of weeds living here.

"These are not weeds, they are all innate origin things, although most of them are high-grade innate origin things, but there are too many of them, this wealth is too amazing!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Without saying a word, he carried out an arrest operation on the six innate origin creatures.

Although the wisdom of those six innate origin creatures was not high, they also knew that Ye Tian was an enemy, and they immediately wanted to escape, and they seemed to be able to mobilize the power of this space, and they could exert their combat power that was not weaker than that of the True Monarch.

Thundered!!!!

The space oscillated, passing out layer by layer, but because there was no True Monarch nearby, no one noticed the movement here.

"Destroy the gods!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Origin Divine Ability, God Destroying, on the six Innate Origin Beings, and with a single blow, he severely damaged their spiritual intelligence, and immediately launched various attacks on them.

But Ye Tiansheng was afraid of destroying these six innate origin lifeforms, so he didn't use any powerful attacks, and only focused on suppression and imprisonment.

Soon, these six innate origin beings were imprisoned by Ye Tian layer by layer, completely sealed in the universe in their bodies, and they could no longer escape.

"Then collect the other innate origin things one by one!"

Ye Tian quickly collected it, and all the innate origin things of the entire space were collected by Ye Tian.

He roughly counted it, and in this space alone, he had harvested more than 30,000 high-grade innate origin objects and 2,000 top-grade innate origin things.

"And the lake!"

Ye Tian was not ready to give up this lake, it contained a large amount of innate origin power, and it must also be a treasure land.

So, Ye Tian forcibly moved this lake into the universe in his body.

Perhaps due to the loss of a large number of innate origin objects and lakes, the rules of this space began to crumble, and it would not be long before it was completely in ruins.

"Gone!"

Ye Tian left here and returned to the ground.

In the following days, Ye Tian did not continue to look for the innate origin things, after all, there were not many innate origin things in the realm of the origin realm, and at most he could find a few high-grade innate origin things in a month.

And a few high-level innate origin things, does he care?

No, he doesn't care!

He has gained too much, and it doesn't matter how little he gains.

Therefore, Ye Tian chose to leave the realm of the source of the realm to avoid a big change.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to the Void Heaven True Kingdom and returned to his own territory.

At this moment, he was truly relieved!
